composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in main.py
- Resolve the issue of Flask not finding the HTML template files by ensuring the Flask app is correctly configured to locate the 'templates' directory.
- Verify and fix the routing and rendering logic for all seven pages  Dashboard, Artifact Catalog, Exhibitions, Exhibition Details, Visitor Tickets, Virtual Events, and Audio Guides.
- Address the redirect issue on the exhibition_details page by ensuring data files are correctly loaded and exhibition IDs are properly matched.
- Maintain all original task requirements including data file read/write operations, data parsing, filtering, searching, user interaction logic, and navigation coordination.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure backend routes match frontend template names and URLs.
composition.Programmer 2:
Fix and complete all frontend HTML templates in the templates/ directory
- Ensure all seven HTML templates (dashboard.html, artifact_catalog.html, exhibitions.html, exhibition_details.html, visitor_tickets.html, virtual_events.html, audio_guides.html) are present in the 'templates' directory at the root of the Flask project.
- Verify that all page elements have the specified IDs as per the original task requirements.
- Ensure all navigation URLs in the frontend use Flask routes (via url_for) and not direct HTML file names.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure frontend templates correspond correctly to backend routes and data passed.
